name: postgres_activity_query_catalog
description: Reusable PostgreSQL monitoring and diagnostics queries for pg_stat_activity, pg_locks, connection tracing, and session management.

queries.name: Connection summary by application, user, client, and state
queries.description: High-level summary of client backend connections grouped by application_name, user, client address, and state.
queries.sql:
SELECT
    COALESCE(NULLIF(application_name, ''), '(blank)') AS application_name,
    usename,
    client_addr,
    state,
    COUNT(*) AS connection_count
FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE backend_type = 'client backend'
GROUP BY application_name, usename, client_addr, state
ORDER BY connection_count DESC;

queries.name: Detailed client backend sessions
queries.description: Detailed session list for all real client backends, including age, wait events, and current/last query text.
queries.sql:
SELECT
    pid,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(application_name, ''), '(blank)') AS application_name,
    usename,
    datname,
    client_addr,
    backend_start,
    now() - backend_start AS connection_age,
    state,
    wait_event_type,
    wait_event,
    query
FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE backend_type = 'client backend'
ORDER BY backend_start ASC;

queries.name: Wait event summary
queries.description: Summarize sessions by state, wait_event_type, and wait_event.
queries.sql:
SELECT
    state,
    wait_event_type,
    wait_event,
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM pg_stat_activity
GROUP BY state, wait_event_type, wait_event
ORDER BY count DESC;

queries.name: Lock summary
queries.description: Summarize locks by type, mode, and granted flag.
queries.sql:
SELECT
    l.locktype,
    l.mode,
    l.granted,
    COUNT(*) AS lock_count
FROM pg_locks l
JOIN pg_stat_activity a
    ON a.pid = l.pid
GROUP BY l.locktype, l.mode, l.granted
ORDER BY lock_count DESC, l.locktype, l.mode;

queries.name: Traced app sessions
queries.description: Show traced app sessions where application_name includes request id metadata.
queries.sql:
SELECT
    pid,
    application_name,
    backend_start,
    now() - backend_start AS connection_age,
    state,
    query
FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE backend_type = 'client backend'
  AND datname = :database_name
  AND application_name LIKE (:app_prefix || '|rid=%')
ORDER BY backend_start ASC;

queries.name: Untagged or partially tagged app sessions
queries.description: Show app sessions that are either blank or only have the base application name without request tracing.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: Exact base application name, example emtac_app

queries.sql:
SELECT
    pid,
    application_name,
    backend_start,
    now() - backend_start AS connection_age,
    state,
    query
FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE backend_type = 'client backend'
  AND datname = :database_name
  AND (
        application_name = :app_name
        OR application_name = ''
        OR application_name IS NULL
      )
ORDER BY backend_start ASC;
